models.name: TinyLlama 1.1B Chat
models.summary: The lightest option. Great for very small PCs, testing, and fast UI demos.
models.recommended_for: Entry-level CPUs, 8 GB RAM, quick prototypes, and automation helpers.

models.name: Gemma 2 2B Instruct
models.summary: A small everyday assistant model that stays lightweight while feeling more capable than tiny models.
models.recommended_for: Low to mid-range CPUs with 8 GB RAM.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B Instruct
models.summary: A very small modern instruct model with better multilingual behavior than most ultra-light options.
models.recommended_for: Low to mid-range CPUs, multilingual users, and 8 GB RAM systems.

models.name: SmolLM2 1.7B Instruct
models.summary: A compact assistant model that stays fast on CPU while feeling more stable than toy models.
models.recommended_for: Budget desktops, automation helpers, and users who want a quick local assistant.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
models.summary: A balanced small model with modern instruction tuning and better quality than ultra-tiny options.
models.recommended_for: Mid-range laptops and desktops with 8 to 12 GB RAM.

models.name: Phi-3.5 Mini Instruct
models.summary: A compact model with noticeably better reasoning than tiny models while staying fast on CPU.
models.recommended_for: Mid-range laptops and desktops with 8 to 16 GB RAM.

models.name: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3
models.summary: A widely used instruct model with strong general text quality and broad compatibility.
models.recommended_for: Desktop CPUs with 14 to 16 GB RAM.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct
models.summary: A popular instruct model with strong multilingual output and better long-form answers than smaller models.
models.recommended_for: Desktop CPUs with 16 GB RAM, multilingual use, and users who want stronger quality without going to the heaviest tier.

models.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct
models.summary: The recommended all-round choice for this project. Good quality, good compatibility, and solid CPU behavior.
models.recommended_for: Modern desktop CPUs such as Intel Core i7 or Ryzen 7 with 16 GB or more RAM.

models.name: LLaVA 1.5 7B Vision
models.summary: Vision-capable model for screenshots and image understanding. Use this when you want desktop view or image uploads.
models.recommended_for: Desktop CPUs with 16 GB or more RAM and users who need screenshot or image analysis.

models.name: Mistral Nemo Instruct 12B
models.summary: The strongest built-in text option in this catalog. Better answer quality, but slower and much heavier.
models.recommended_for: High-end CPUs, 24 GB or more RAM, and users who prefer quality over latency.
